case_title: COSTA, PAOLO VS LEWIS C. NELSON AND SONS, INC. DBA NELSON, DWIGHT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS C. NELSON AND SONS, INC.
